description: Exact replication subset from materials-paper-v2. Four strong cases and two prespecified weak/negative cases are rerun only to persist per-layer J/logit trajectories for auditable figures.

prompts.title: Resistance to notch-driven failure 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: During a compact-tension test, substantial energy is dissipated near the notch tip before the specimen separates. The material tolerates larger defects than a comparison alloy.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Dimpled tensile failure 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: After substantial plastic elongation, a metal bar separated along a surface filled with microscopic pits around second-phase particles. Neighboring pits had joined into larger depressions.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Crystal line-imperfection motion 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Under resolved loading, a line imperfection moves across a close-packed plane in the direction of its mismatch vector, leaving a permanent offset at the free surface.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Rapid diffusionless steel transformation 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Suppressing atomic redistribution during cooling converts the parent face-centered phase into a hard acicular product. The new body-centered cell has a c-to-a ratio different from one.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Faceted low-temperature failure 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A thick steel plate failed suddenly in cold service without visible plastic distortion. Microscopy revealed flat planes and converging river patterns cutting across grain interiors.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: High-temperature environmental surface layer 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A nickel alloy held in hot air develops an adherent multilayer surface film as metal atoms react with oxygen. Continued exposure thickens the film according to an approximately parabolic time law.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.
